settings.heroHeadline: Your One Stop Shop for Uniforms & More in Malawi
settings.heroSubheadline: School Uniforms · Corporate Wear · Safety Gear · Men's Suits · Screen Printing
settings.aboutText: Welcome to Uniform Solution & General Dealers, your premier destination for all uniform and clothing needs in Malawi. Located in the heart of Area 49 Shire, Lilongwe, we pride ourselves on being a trusted supplier of high-quality garments.

categories.title: School Uniforms
categories.description: Complete uniforms including shirts, trousers, jerseys, socks, and shoes for all schools.

categories.title: Corporate Wear
categories.description: Professional corporate clothing and uniforms for businesses and institutions.

categories.title: Safety & Security Gear
categories.description: High visibility vests, boots, helmets, and complete security guard uniforms.

categories.title: Men's Suits
categories.description: High-quality tailored and ready-made men's suits for all formal occasions.

categories.title: Bags & Luggage
categories.description: Durable school bags, laptop bags, travel luggage, and backpacks.

categories.title: Perfumes & Lotions
categories.description: A wide selection of body lotions, sprays, and designer perfumes.

categories.title: Plain T-Shirts
categories.description: High-quality plain pilot t-shirts available in all sizes and colors.

categories.title: Sweaters & Jerseys
categories.description: Warm and durable sweaters and jerseys for school and corporate needs.

products.name: Men's Shirt
products.description: Premium quality men's formal shirt. Crisp finish, comfortable fit, available in classic colors.

products.name: Men's Trouser
products.description: Tailored men's formal trousers. Quality fabric, professional fit.

products.name: Men's Decent Shoes
products.description: Premium formal leather shoes for office, weddings, and special occasions. Multiple colors and sizes available.

products.name: Men's Casual Shoes
products.description: Stylish casual shoes for everyday wear. Comfortable, versatile, and durable.

products.name: School Shirt
products.description: Quality cotton school shirts for all schools in Malawi. Comfortable, durable, easy to wash.

products.name: School Trouser
products.description: Durable, perfectly tailored school trousers in all sizes.

products.name: School Skirt
products.description: Pleated school skirts in all sizes. Quality fabric that holds shape and color.

products.name: School Jersey
products.description: Warm school jerseys. Embroidery options available for school logos and crests.

products.name: School Shoes
products.description: Quality, durable genuine leather school shoes in all sizes.

products.name: School Socks
products.description: Quality school socks in standard colors. Available in all sizes.

products.name: School Tie
products.description: School ties in school colors and patterns. Custom designs available.

products.name: Track Suit
products.description: Comfortable track suits for sports, PE, and athletic activities.

products.name: Shorts
products.description: Quality school and sports shorts. Comfortable and durable.

products.name: T-Shirt
products.description: Plain and printed t-shirts available in all sizes and colors.

products.name: Golf Shirt
products.description: Premium quality golf (polo) shirts for school and corporate use. Embroidery available.

products.name: School Bag — Large
products.description: Large size school bag. Spacious, padded straps, durable build for daily use.

products.name: School Bag — Medium
products.description: Medium size school bag. Perfect balance of space and comfort for primary and middle schoolers.

products.name: School Bag — Small
products.description: Small size school bag. Ideal for younger learners. Lightweight and durable.

products.name: Cap
products.description: Quality caps for branding, sports, and corporate use. Custom embroidery available.

products.name: Field Jacket
products.description: Durable field jacket for outdoor and industrial work. Weather-resistant.

products.name: Reflective Worksuit / Coverall
products.description: Heavy-duty two-piece coverall (jacket + trouser) with high-visibility reflective strips. Available in navy, royal blue, green, orange, and pink. Reinforced stitching, multiple pockets, ideal for industrial, construction, and field work.

products.name: Gumboots / Rubber Boots
products.description: Heavy-duty rubber gumboots with non-slip soles. Waterproof, durable, perfect for farms, construction sites, and rainy conditions. Available in all sizes.

products.name: Hard Hat / Safety Helmet
products.description: Industrial safety helmet with adjustable strap and impact-resistant shell. Available in white, yellow, orange, red, and blue. Compliant with workplace safety standards.

products.name: High-Visibility Safety Vest
products.description: Reflective safety vest with multiple pockets. Bright orange or lime-yellow with reflective stripes for maximum visibility. Essential for road workers, construction crews, and security personnel.

products.name: Steel-Toe Safety Boots
products.description: Reinforced steel-toe boots with anti-slip, oil-resistant soles. Premium leather upper. Protects against impact, compression, and punctures. Available in all sizes.

products.name: Safety Work Gloves
products.description: Heavy-duty work gloves — leather, rubber, and nitrile-coated options available. Cut-resistant, chemical-resistant variants for industrial use.

products.name: Safety Goggles & Glasses
products.description: Impact-resistant safety goggles and protective glasses. Anti-fog, UV-protected lenses. Essential for grinding, welding, chemical handling, and lab work.

products.name: Ear Muffs / Hearing Protection
products.description: Industrial-grade ear muffs and ear plugs for noise reduction. Comfortable padded headband, foldable design. Essential for factories, airports, and construction.

products.name: Respirator / Dust Mask
products.description: N95 dust masks and full reusable respirators with replaceable filters. Protection against dust, fumes, and chemical vapors.

products.name: Full-Body Safety Harness
products.description: Full-body fall-arrest harness with adjustable straps and metal D-rings. Essential for working at heights — scaffolding, roofing, tower work. Includes shock-absorbing lanyard.

products.name: Security Guard Uniform
products.description: Complete security guard uniform set: shirt, trouser, beret/cap, belt. Custom embroidery available for company logos. Quality fabric for daily duty wear.

products.name: Reflective Rain Jacket
products.description: Hi-vis waterproof rain jacket with reflective strips. Ideal for road maintenance, traffic control, and outdoor security work.
